title: hahaland Baby Toys 6-9-12 Months –Montessori Sensory Fruit Vegetable Plush Garden Toy with Rattles, Mirror, Squeaker, Textures, Crinkle Tissues – Travel Toy Gift for Boys & Girls
features: 🥕【Montessori-Inspired Sensory Exploration】This interactive plush vegetable garden toy is designed to support early sensory development through rich textures, crinkle sounds, and bright contrasting colours. Babies can touch, squeeze, and listen as they explore a world of soft veggies and playful sounds—perfect for encouraging tactile, visual, and auditory growth in babies aged 6 to 12 months.

✋【Fine Motor Skills Through Pulling, Grasping & Placing】From pulling out the carrot to placing the broccoli back into the garden box, each action encourages hand-eye coordination, finger strength and precision. Ideal for developing fine motor skills through repetitive and rewarding play.

🌞【Encourages Bonding & Language Development】From naming vegetables to mimicking garden chores, this toy is perfect for parent-child play. Use the plush veggies to introduce colours, shapes, and healthy food vocabulary, stimulating early speech and social interaction. Whether you're telling stories about farming or pretending to cook, this toy opens the door to rich, meaningful interaction and emotional bonding moments.

🚗【Portable, Tidy & Ready for Travel】Neatly packaged in a durable, soft-sided garden-themed case with a carry handle, this toy is travel-ready and easy to store. Whether you're off to the grandparents’ house, on a long car ride, or just tidying up at home, the all-in-one design keeps play tidy and convenient. Perfect for prams, nurseries, and on-the-go entertainment—no loose pieces to lose!

🎁【Perfect Gift for Baby Showers or First Year Milestones】A unique, colourful and educational gift that parents will love and babies will grow with. Encourages early learning through play, while neatly storing all pieces for tidy rooms and easy travel. Ideal for birthdays, baby showers or holiday surprises.
description: Product Description Hands-On Fun for Curious Little Explorers Encourages Tactile Discovery & Bonding From the first grasp to the joyful pull, this plush activity set sparks delight in every touch. Watch your baby explore different textures—rattles, crinkles, and soft roots—while building fine motor skills. Ideal for parent-child playtime, it turns simple moments into joyful memories. Whether at home or at grandma’s, it’s the perfect Montessori toy for babies 6 to 12 months. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
